story.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face address security incident during model evaluation

draft:
I've been following the recent security incident during model evaluation at OpenAI and Hugging Face. 
The companies have taken steps to address the issue, but it highlights the need for rigorous testing. 
Key takeaways include improved validation and verification protocols.
What measures can we take to prevent similar incidents in the future?
#AIsecurity #MachineLearning #ModelEvaluation
